title: roasted uruguayan potatoes gratin
description: a comforting, crispy roasted potato gratin inspired by uruguayan cuisine, featuring fresh cilantro leaves and a hint of ayurvedic-rajasic flavor.

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: choose high-starch potatoes for the crispiest results

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: thinly slice the onion for even roasting

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality extra-virgin olive oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt for added texture

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground for the best flavor

ingredients.name: fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: chopped for garnish and added flavor

ingredients.name: gruy4re cheese
ingredients.notes: grated for a creamy, melty topping

ingredients.name: ayurvedic spice blend
ingredients.notes: add your favorite blend for an extra layer of flavor

instructions: toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet, and roast for 20 minutes.
add the minced garlic and sliced onion to the potatoes and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes.
remove the potatoes from the oven and top with grated gruy4re cheese and chopped cilantro.
return the potatoes to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove the potatoes from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
